features.name: sv class declaration with member properties
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class declaration containing one or more typed member properties (class variables)

features.name: class inheritance with extends keyword
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class that extends a base class using the extends keyword, forming a single-inheritance hierarchy

features.name: class handle type variable declaration
features.description: Code should include a declaration of a variable whose type is a class handle (an opaque reference to a class object), used to reference dynamically created class instances

features.name: class implementing interface with implements keyword
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class that implements one or more interfaces using the implements keyword

features.name: class scoping and nested class type references
features.description: Code should include references to class-scoped identifiers using the class scope resolution operator (::), accessing properties or types defined within a class
